nodes.label: main() with no subcommand prints help and exits with code 0.
init creates .archml-workspace.yaml in the specified directory.
init writes workspace name, source-import mapping, and build-directory into the
init creates the workspace directory when it does not yet exist.
init exits with error code 1 when .archml-workspace.yaml already exists.
init exits with error code 1 when the mnemonic name is an empty string.
init exits with error code 1 when the mnemonic name has an invalid format.
init exits with error code 1 when the mnemonic name contains a slash.
init succeeds when the directory exists but has no .archml-workspace.yaml.
Return a minimal remote workspace .archml-workspace.yaml with the given name.
check exits with code 0 and reports no files when workspace has none.
check discovers .farchml files, compiles them, and reports success.
check exits with code 1 when a .farchml file has a parse error.
check exits with code 1 when business validation finds errors.
check uses the build-directory from .archml-workspace.yaml when present.
check exits with code 1 when .archml-workspace.yaml is invalid.
check exits with error code 1 when no workspace file is found anywhere in the tr
check finds the workspace by walking up from a subdirectory.
check exits with error code 1 when directory does not exist.
check exits with code 1 and prints error message on parse failure.
check resolves mnemonic imports from the workspace YAML source-imports.
check exits with code 1 when .archml-workspace.yaml is invalid.
Artifacts in the build directory are not re-scanned as source files.
check exits with code 1 when workspace config has no source-imports.
visualize exits with error code 1 when directory does not exist.
Write a minimal viewer template in tmp_path and return its path.
export exits 0 and creates the output HTML file.
export embeds a <script id="archml-data"> tag in the HTML output.
export embeds valid JSON with version, files, and entities keys.
export uses architecture.html as the default output filename.
export exits with code 1 when no workspace yaml is found.
export exits with code 1 when the workspace directory does not exist.
export exits with code 1 when the viewer template does not exist.
sync-remote exits with code 1 when no workspace file is found.
sync-remote exits with code 1 when directory does not exist.
visualize exits with error code 1 when no workspace file is found.
visualize exits with error code 1 when no .farchml files are found.
visualize exits with error code 1 when entity path is not found.
sync-remote finds the workspace by walking up from a subdirectory.
sync-remote exits 0 when no git imports are configured.
sync-remote exits 1 when the lockfile is missing.
sync-remote exits 1 when the lockfile has no resolved repositories.
sync-remote skips a repo that is already at the pinned commit.
sync-remote calls clone_at_commit when repo is not at the pinned commit.
sync-remote exits 1 and reports an error if clone_at_commit fails.
visualize with .svg output calls the SVG renderer and exits with code 0.
sync-remote uses the remote-sync-directory from workspace config.
update-remote exits with code 1 when no workspace file is found.
update-remote exits with code 1 when directory does not exist.
update-remote finds the workspace by walking up from a subdirectory.
update-remote exits 0 when no git imports are configured.
update-remote resolves a tag to a commit and records the workspace identity.
update-remote accepts a full commit hash as the revision.
update-remote replaces a stale lockfile with the freshly resolved closure.
update-remote exits 1 if a revision cannot be resolved.
check includes synced remote repos' mnemonics in the source import map when they
check exposes @repo/mnemonic keys from the remote repo's workspace config.
check emits a warning when a remote repo's .archml-workspace.yaml is invalid.
update-remote -> sync-remote -> check resolves a remote import via a local alias
update-remote records transitively reachable workspaces in the lockfile closure.
update-remote exits 1 when the same repo workspace is required at two commits.
